name: io.github.yjhann33-design/korea-stock-insight-mcp
description: Korean stock market MCP server (DART disclosures + KRX prices). English-first tool descriptions for global LLM analysts. Hybrid: free stdio tier + optional paid SSE tier with English summaries.

environment_variables.name: DART_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Free API key from opendart.fss.or.kr (sign up, get instantly). Required for all DART disclosure tools.
